column1: Jake McCarthy leads the slate with a strong hit probability and a recent uptick in production, batting leadoff at home with the platoon edge against Miles Mikolas and a favorable park boost. CJ Abrams also brings reliability near the top of the order, offering a similar matchup advantage and steady hit rates. Luis Arraez’s consistency stands out, but his recent dip tempers confidence. James Wood and Luis Garcia Jr. round out the list as deeper options in the same favorable environment.
